creator: nbari@tequila.io
text:
Yes it works with php 5.4

(In reply to Danilo Egea Gondolfo from comment #1)
> Does this port work with the default version of php (5.4)?
> Using the default version as 5.5 I'm getting this error [1]:
> 
> Installing php5-5.4.29...pkg-static: php5-5.4.29 conflicts with php55-5.5.13
> (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/php
> 
> [1] -
> https://redports.org//~daniloegea/20140703200500-2667-220726/dalmp-3.0.2.log
